ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product component */,
  "p_name" TEXT /* Name of the product component */,
  "p_mfgr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "p_brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "p_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product */,
  "p_size" INTEGER /* Size of the product component */,
  "p_container_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the container type of the product */,
  "p_retailprice" REAL /* Retail price of the product component */,
  "p_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the product */,
  "p_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product component */,
  "p_material" TEXT /* Material used in the product component */,
  "p_manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "p_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product component */,
  "p_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_partkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_mfgr_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_mfgr_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("mfgr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_container_id") REFERENCES container_types ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "mfgr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_website" TEXT /* Website URL for the manufacturer */,
  "mfgr_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfgr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "type_image" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the product type */,
  "type_risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level associated with the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "container_types" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container type */,
  "container_name" TEXT /* Name of the container type */,
  "container_description" TEXT /* Description of the container type */,
  "container_image" TEXT /* URL to an image of the container type */,
  "container_material" TEXT /* Material of the container */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the product component */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product component in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "inventory_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product component */,
  "inventory_alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock fell below the threshold */,
  "inventory_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the last restock */,
  "inventory_last_supplied_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity supplied during the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_p_partkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_partkey") REFERENCES products ("p_partkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "warehouse_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* Website URL for the supplier */,
  "supplier_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the supplier was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the product component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "supply_cost" REAL /* Cost of supplying the product component */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the product component from the supplier */,
  "ps_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product component */,
  "ps_last_supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last supply */,
  "ps_next_supply_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_p_partkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_partkey") REFERENCES products ("p_partkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the base product component */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "variant_image" TEXT /* URL to an image of the variant */,
  "variant_manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture for the variant */,
  "variant_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_p_partkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_partkey") REFERENCES products ("p_partkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  "order_shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "order_delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the product component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product component ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product component */,
  "order_detail_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product component */,
  "order_detail_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product component */,
  "order_detail_total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product component including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_p_partkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_partkey") REFERENCES products ("p_partkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "customer_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "customer_company_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, procurement officer, sales team) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "p_partkey" INTEGER /* ID of the product component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the product component */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the product component */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_p_partkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_partkey") REFERENCES products ("p_partkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
